title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
description: A philosophical novel about a shepherd named Santiago who dreams of discovering his personal legend.

title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: A practical guide to building good habits, breaking bad ones, and improving every day.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship and best coding practices.

title: The Pragmatic Programmer
author: Andrew Hunt & David Thomas
description: Classic software engineering advice for becoming a better programmer.

title: Eloquent JavaScript
author: Marijn Haverbeke
description: A modern introduction to JavaScript programming and web development.

title: The C Programming Language
author: Brian W. Kernighan & Dennis M. Ritchie
description: The classic book that introduced the C programming language.

title: A Brief History of Time
author: Stephen Hawking
description: An accessible explanation of cosmology, black holes, and the origins of the universe.

title: The Selfish Gene
author: Richard Dawkins
description: An influential book explaining evolution through the concept of the gene.

title: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: A fascinating look at the history and evolution of Homo sapiens.

title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
author: J. K. Rowling
description: The first novel in the Harry Potter series, introducing the young wizard and Hogwarts.

title: To Kill a Mockingbird
author: Harper Lee
description: A timeless novel exploring justice, racism, and morality in the American South.

title: The Great Gatsby
author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
description: A classic novel depicting wealth, ambition, and the American Dream in the 1920s.
